message:
fix(retry): remove unnecessary dereference on attempt counter in retry predicate check

The should_retry() call was passing *attempt (dereferencing a &u32),
which is valid but unnecessary since should_retry takes a u32 by value
and auto-deref handles the conversion. Removing the explicit dereference
aligns with the surrounding code style and avoids a clippy
needless_borrow-adjacent pattern.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
